modules.name: hivemind_core.version
documentation: START_VERSION_BLOCK

functions.name: hivemind_core.service.create_self_signed_cert
documentation:
If name.crt and name.key don't exist in cert_dir, create a new
self-signed cert and key pair and write them into that directory.

functions.name: hivemind_core.database.cast2client
documentation:
Convert different input types (str, dict, list) to Client instances.

Args:
    ret: The object to be cast, can be a string, dictionary, or list.

Returns:
    A single Client instance or a list of Clients if ret is a list.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.__post_init__
documentation: Initializes the allowed types for the Client instance if not provided.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.serialize
documentation:
Serializes the Client instance into a JSON string.

Returns:
    A JSON string representing the client data.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.deserialize
documentation:
Deserialize a client from JSON string or dictionary into a Client instance.

Args:
    client_data: The data to be deserialized, either a string or dictionary.

Returns:
    A Client instance.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.__getitem__
documentation:
Access attributes of the client via item access.

Args:
    item: The name of the attribute.

Returns:
    The value of the attribute.

Raises:
    KeyError: If the attribute does not exist.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.__setitem__
documentation:
Set attributes of the client via item access.

Args:
    key: The name of the attribute.
    value: The value to set.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the attribute does not exist.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.__eq__
documentation:
Compares two Client instances for equality based on their serialized data.

Args:
    other: The other Client or Client-compatible object to compare with.

Returns:
    True if the clients are equal, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.Client.__repr__
documentation:
Returns a string representation of the Client instance.

Returns:
    A string representing the client.

classes.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.add_item
documentation:
Add a client to the database.

Args:
    client: The client to be added.

Returns:
    True if the addition was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.delete_item
documentation:
Delete a client from the database.

Args:
    client: The client to be deleted.

Returns:
    True if the deletion was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.update_item
documentation:
Update an existing client in the database.

Args:
    client: The client to be updated.

Returns:
    True if the update was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.replace_item
documentation:
Replace an old client with a new client.

Args:
    old_client: The old client to be replaced.
    new_client: The new client to add.

Returns:
    True if the replacement was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.search_by_value
documentation:
Search for clients by a specific key-value pair.

Args:
    key: The key to search by.
    val: The value to search for.

Returns:
    A list of clients that match the search criteria.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.__len__
documentation:
Get the number of items in the database.

Returns:
    The number of items in the database.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.__iter__
documentation:
Iterate over all clients in the database.

Returns:
    An iterator over the clients in the database.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.AbstractDB.commit
documentation:
Commit changes to the database.

Returns:
    True if the commit was successful, False otherwise.

Abstract base class for all database implementations.

All database implementations should derive from this class and implement
the abstract methods.

classes.name: hivemind_core.database.JsonDB

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.JsonDB.add_item
documentation:
Add a client to the JSON database.

Args:
    client: The client to be added.

Returns:
    True if the addition was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.JsonDB.search_by_value
documentation:
Search for clients by a specific key-value pair in the JSON database.

Args:
    key: The key to search by.
    val: The value to search for.

Returns:
    A list of clients that match the search criteria.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.JsonDB.__len__
documentation:
Get the number of clients in the database.

Returns:
    The number of clients in the database.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.JsonDB.__iter__
documentation:
Iterate over all clients in the JSON database.

Returns:
    An iterator over the clients in the database.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.JsonDB.commit
documentation:
Commit changes to the JSON database.

Returns:
    True if the commit was successful, False otherwise.
Database implementation using JSON files.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.SQLiteDB.__init__
documentation: Initialize the SQLiteDB connection.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.SQLiteDB._initialize_database
documentation: Initialize the database schema.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.SQLiteDB.add_item
documentation:
Add a client to the SQLite database.

Args:
    client: The client to be added.

Returns:
    True if the addition was successful, False otherwise.

documentation:
Search for clients by a specific key-value pair in the SQLite database.

Args:

    val: The value to search for.

Returns:

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.SQLiteDB.__len__
documentation: Get the number of clients in the database.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.SQLiteDB.__iter__

Iterate over all clients in the SQLite database.

Database implementation using SQLite.

classes.name: hivemind_core.database.RedisDB

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.RedisDB.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the RedisDB connection.

Args:
    host: Redis server host.
    port: Redis server port.
    redis_db: Redis database index.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.RedisDB.add_item
documentation:
Add a client to Redis and RediSearch.

Args:
    client: The client to be added.

Returns:
    True if the addition was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.RedisDB.search_by_value
documentation:
Search for clients by a specific key-value pair in Redis.

Args:
    key: The key to search by.
    val: The value to search for.

Returns:
    A list of clients that match the search criteria.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.RedisDB.__len__
documentation:
Get the number of items in the Redis database.

Returns:
    The number of clients in the database.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.RedisDB.__iter__
documentation:
Iterate over all clients in Redis.

Returns:
    An iterator over the clients in the database.
Database implementation using Redis with RediSearch support.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.ClientDatabase.__init__
documentation: Initialize the client database with the specified backend.

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.ClientDatabase.__enter__
documentation: Context handler

methods.name: hivemind_core.database.ClientDatabase.__exit__
documentation: Commits changes and Closes the session

functions.name: hivemind_core.scripts.get_db_kwargs
documentation: Get database configuration kwargs based on backend type.

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.ProtocolVersion.ZERO
documentation: json only, no handshake, no binary

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.ProtocolVersion.ONE
documentation: handshake https://github.com/JarbasHiveMind/HiveMind-core/pull/29

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.ProtocolVersion.TWO
documentation: binary https://github.com/JarbasHiveMind/hivemind_websocket_client/pull/4

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.CANDIDATE_NODE
documentation: potential node, if it manages to connect...

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.NODE
documentation: anything connected to the hivemind is a "node"

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.MIND
documentation: listening for connections and providing mycroft-core

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.FAKECROFT
documentation: a mind, that pretends to be running mycroft

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.SLAVE
documentation: node that can be partially controlled by a "mind"

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.TERMINAL
documentation: user facing endpoint that connects to some Mind

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.BRIDGE
documentation: connects some external service to the hive

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.HIVE
documentation: a collection of nodes

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindNodeType.MASTER_MIND
documentation: the top level node, not connected to anything

classes.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection.authorize
documentation:
parse the message being injected into ovos-core bus
if this client is not authorized to inject it return False

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection.sess
documentation: unique session per client

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection.msg_blacklist
documentation: list of ovos message_type to never be sent to this client

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection.skill_blacklist
documentation: list of skill_id that can't match for this client

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection.intent_blacklist
documentation: list of skill_id:intent_name that can't match for this client

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindClientConnection.allowed_types
documentation: list of ovos message_type to allow to be sent from this client
represents a connection to the hivemind listener

classes.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerInternalProtocol

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerInternalProtocol.handle_send
documentation:
ovos wants to send a HiveMessage

a device can be both a master and a slave, downstream messages are handled here

HiveMindSlaveInternalProtocol will handle requests meant to go upstream
mycroft handlers  - from master -> slave

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerInternalProtocol.handle_internal_mycroft
documentation:
forward internal messages to clients if they are the target
here is where the client isolation happens,
clients only get responses to their own messages
this class handles all interactions between a hivemind listener and a ovos-core messagebus

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handle_message
documentation:
message (HiveMessage): HiveMind message object

Process message from client, decide what to do internally here

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handle_unknown_message
documentation:
message handler for non default message types, subclasses can
handle their own types here

message (HiveMessage): HiveMind message object
HiveMind protocol messages -  from slave -> master

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handle_broadcast_message
documentation: message (HiveMessage): HiveMind message object

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handle_propagate_message
documentation: message (HiveMessage): HiveMind message object

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handle_escalate_message
documentation: message (HiveMessage): HiveMind message object

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol._update_blacklist
documentation: HiveMind mycroft bus messages -  from slave -> master

methods.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handle_inject_mycroft_msg
documentation: message (Message): mycroft bus message object

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.require_crypto
documentation: throw error if crypto key not available

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.handshake_enabled
documentation: generate a key per session if not pre-shared

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.escalate_callback
documentation: slave asked to escalate payload

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.illegal_callback
documentation: slave asked to broadcast payload (illegal action)

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.propagate_callback
documentation: slave asked to propagate payload

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.broadcast_callback
documentation: slave asked to broadcast payload

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.mycroft_bus_callback
documentation: slave asked to inject payload into mycroft bus

class_variables.name: hivemind_core.protocol.HiveMindListenerProtocol.shared_bus_callback
documentation: passive sharing of slave device bus (info)
